content: Always run database migrations before deploying new code. The deployment script does NOT auto-migrate.
Prefer explicit error messages over generic 'something went wrong' responses. Include the actual error code and affected resource.
When modifying API endpoints, always check the OpenAPI spec file first. The spec is the source of truth, not the implementation.
The test suite requires Docker to be running for integration tests. Unit tests work without Docker.
Chose PostgreSQL over MongoDB for the main database because the data model is highly relational with complex joins.
